fallback_questions.label: Agent role
fallback_questions.placeholder: Describe the role or job this agent should perform.

fallback_questions.label: Inputs
fallback_questions.placeholder: What context or material does it receive?

fallback_questions.label: Constraints
fallback_questions.placeholder: What should it avoid or keep bounded?

archetypes.title: Planner
archetypes.summary: Breaks work into bounded steps, keeps execution orderly, and makes the next action obvious.
example_jobs: turn a bug report into an implementation plan
coordinate a multi-agent workflow with clear handoffs

starter_questions.label: Primary goal
starter_questions.placeholder: What should this planner accomplish?

starter_questions.label: Inputs
starter_questions.placeholder: What context, artifacts, or variables does it receive?

starter_questions.label: Outputs
starter_questions.placeholder: What should it return or decide?

starter_questions.label: Constraints
starter_questions.placeholder: What should it avoid, preserve, or keep bounded?

suggested_components.title: Role
suggested_components.content_template: You are a planning-oriented agent for a multi-agent workflow. Keep work structured, explicit, and easy for downstream agents to follow.

suggested_components.title: Task

archetypes.title: Coder
archetypes.summary: Implements changes carefully, reasons from the codebase, and keeps outputs scoped to the requested work.
example_jobs: fix a bug without breaking surrounding behavior
implement a small feature and explain the change

starter_questions.label: Coding task
starter_questions.placeholder: What should the coding agent build or fix?

starter_questions.label: Inputs
starter_questions.placeholder: What files, specs, or context should it use?

starter_questions.label: Expected result
starter_questions.placeholder: What should the final result look like?

starter_questions.label: Constraints
starter_questions.placeholder: Any quality bar, boundaries, or forbidden changes?

suggested_components.title: Role
suggested_components.content_template: You are a precise coding agent. Read the existing code carefully, preserve working behavior, and prefer minimal changes that fully solve the task.

archetypes.title: Writer
archetypes.summary: Produces clear, audience-aware writing with a tight brief, stable structure, and explicit output requirements.
example_jobs: draft documentation for a technical workflow
turn raw notes into a polished summary

starter_questions.label: Writing brief
starter_questions.placeholder: What should this writer create?

starter_questions.label: Audience
starter_questions.placeholder: Who will read the result?

starter_questions.label: Inputs
starter_questions.placeholder: What source material or facts should it use?

starter_questions.label: Output format
starter_questions.placeholder: What should the finished deliverable look like?

starter_questions.label: Constraints
starter_questions.placeholder: Any tone, length, or formatting constraints?

suggested_components.title: Role
suggested_components.content_template: You are a careful writer. Keep the result clear, audience-aware, and tightly aligned to the requested deliverable.

archetypes.title: Researcher
archetypes.summary: Synthesizes evidence, traces claims back to inputs, and keeps uncertainty explicit instead of bluffing certainty.
example_jobs: compare source material and extract the strongest evidence
summarize a topic with open questions and gaps

starter_questions.label: Research goal
starter_questions.placeholder: What should this researcher investigate?

starter_questions.label: Inputs
starter_questions.placeholder: What material, corpus, or data can it use?

starter_questions.label: Outputs
starter_questions.placeholder: What should the final synthesis include?

starter_questions.label: Constraints
starter_questions.placeholder: What should it avoid inferring or overclaiming?

suggested_components.title: Role
suggested_components.content_template: You are a research-oriented agent. Work from evidence, note uncertainty, and separate observations from conclusions.

archetypes.title: Evaluator
archetypes.summary: Reviews work against explicit criteria, surfaces risks, and explains the basis for each judgment.
example_jobs: review a prompt draft against quality criteria
grade an output and explain what should improve

starter_questions.label: Review target
starter_questions.placeholder: What artifact, draft, or output is being evaluated?

starter_questions.label: Evaluation criteria
starter_questions.placeholder: What dimensions should the evaluator score or inspect?

starter_questions.label: Output format
starter_questions.placeholder: How should the review be structured?

starter_questions.label: Constraints
starter_questions.placeholder: Any rules for severity, tone, or proof requirements?

suggested_components.title: Role
suggested_components.content_template: You are an evaluator. Review the target carefully, tie feedback to evidence, and make each judgment explicit.

suggested_components.title: Task

archetypes.title: Tool user
archetypes.summary: Uses tools deliberately, knows when to call them, and keeps the response grounded in retrieved or computed results.
example_jobs: decide when to use tools versus direct reasoning

starter_questions.label: Primary goal
starter_questions.placeholder: What should this agent solve?

starter_questions.label: Inputs
starter_questions.placeholder: What context or user inputs does it start with?

starter_questions.label: Tool policy
starter_questions.placeholder: When should it use tools and when should it reason directly?

starter_questions.label: Output contract
starter_questions.placeholder: What should the answer include?

starter_questions.label: Constraints
starter_questions.placeholder: Any boundaries for tool usage or final output?

suggested_components.title: Role
suggested_components.content_template: You are a tool-using agent. Use tools deliberately, explain results clearly, and keep the final answer grounded in the evidence you gather.
